context: Evaluates whether the agent correctly scales to a 3-role debate (Advocate/Skeptic/Migration-Risk) when the decision has real implementation surface, and keeps role framing distinct rather than uniformly adversarial or uniformly neutral.

checklist.name: Adds Migration/Risk role
checklist.description: Agent recognizes multi-file implementation surface and adds a third Migration/Risk role beyond Advocate/Skeptic

checklist.name: Distinct role framings
checklist.description: Advocate and Skeptic get opposing stances; Migration/Risk gets a neutral 'what breaks' framing — not all three treated identically

checklist.name: Verdict incorporates Migration/Risk finding
checklist.description: The synthesized verdict specifically references a concrete point the Migration/Risk reviewer raised

checklist.name: Does not misapply plan-review
checklist.description: Agent does not invoke plan-review or ask for an existing plan file for what is a pre-plan idea
